title: Stellar Modded
description: The official modpack for the Stellar MC fully modded server.
body:
![Shader Compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/phqtHVi7/images/d7be528cd67746639df20fb8bd0605aeb944d300.png)
Beautify your world with amazing shaders! (Taken with a custom BSL Shaders configuration.)

---

## Summary
This is the official modpack for the Stellar MC fully modded server!
This modpack is designed for an optimized and beautified Minecraft survival playthrough for Minecraft players at any level of any niche.

This modpack comes with:
- Quests.
- Origins.
  - Optionally disabled by picking Human.
- Technical mods.
  - Create Mod, Applied Energistics, Powah.
- Crafting mods.
  - Tinkers' Construct.
- Storage mods.
  - Drawers, Chests, Etc.
- Building mods.
  - TONS of (1600+) different building-specific blocks / furnature.
- All topped off with some Quality of Life features and Optimization mods.

## Why should I install this?
The possibilities are endless with this modpack! Build, create, destroy at *your* level! Play with friends, or play solo. Up to you!

## StellarMC Server
This pack is specifically designed for playing on the StellarMC Modded Minecraft Server, however anyone can use this pack!
You can join this server by joining this address ([modded.stellarmc.top](https://stellarmc.top/)).

## Authors
- Drak
- Waffle
- Contributing mod developers

## Credits
We do not own nor maintain any of the mods provided with this pack, nor are we partnered with them.
View each mod's resource page by checking them out either in game or on the content page.

## License additions
You may not redistribute this modpack without prior permission from the mod authors.
Doing so would be a breach of license and will result in the termination of your access.
